mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS uid, ui.nickname AS nickname, ui.avatar_url AS avatar, ui.sign AS sign, u.create_time AS createTime FROM t_user u INNER JOIN t_user_info ui ON ui.user_id = u.id WHERE u.status = 0 AND ui.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%')
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC, u.id DESC
ORDER BY u.create_time ASC, u.id ASC
